name: Cake Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9 x 13 baking pan.
2. In a small saucepan, mix butter, oil, water, and cocoa together. Bring to boil.
3. Add this mixture to flour and sugar, beating until smooth.
4. Add eggs, baking soda, buttermilk, and vanilla. Mix well.
5. Pour into the prepared baking pan and bake for 20 minutes.
6. Prepare frosting while brownies are baking by adding all frosting ingredients to a medium saucepan and heating without boiling.
7. Frost immediately after removing from the oven. Cut into squares when cool.
